articles.title: Chivu is the third Inter coach to lose both of his first derbies after Meazza in 1947 and Chiappella in 1976
articles.summary: Cristian Chivu is the third Inter coach to lose both of his first two Milan derbies in all competitions, after Giuseppe Meazza in 1947 and Giuseppe Chiappella between 1975 and 1976. Opta reports this.

articles.title: It hasn't happened since 2004-2005 that Inter didn't score against Milan for three derbies in a row. Then there were four (with the table)
articles.summary: Inter have not scored for three games in a row against Milan in all competitions for the first time since the period between October 2004 and April 2005 (four in that case, including the 0-3 forfeit in the quarter-final return leg in the Champions League).

articles.title: Seven derbies in a row without losing: to review such a long streak for Milan you have to go back to Ancelotti
articles.summary: Milan (5W, 2D) remained unbeaten in at least seven derbies in a row against Inter in all competitions for the first time since the period between November 2002 and April 2005 (10 in that case). Opta reports it.
